batches.title: Fix command injection, word-splitting, and crash-on-bad-JSON in forge-log.sh
acceptance_criteria: No shell variable is interpolated into a node -e string — JSON is passed via stdin or a temp file
Filenames with spaces are handled correctly (no word-splitting on ls output)
Malformed JSONL lines are skipped with a warning instead of crashing the viewer
jigs/run-all.sh still passes (no trailing whitespace introduced)

batches.title: Fix command injection in checkpoint heredoc and rename misleading $ID variable
acceptance_criteria: The request heredoc no longer performs shell expansion on $ARG — command substitution in ARG text must not execute
Checkpoint files are still correctly generated with the question text preserved literally
Variable names inside each case branch are descriptive (no $ID alias for a file path in the answer branch)
request/answer/resume commands still work end-to-end

batches.title: Fix installer package.json check: -d → -f
acceptance_criteria: Line 33 uses [ -f "$FORGE_DIR/package.json" ] instead of [ -d … ]
npm ci is executed when package.json exists as a file

batches.title: Fix race condition, negative-USD, and silent error-swallow in budget.mjs
acceptance_criteria: Concurrent guard calls cannot undercount turns (mkdir-based or file-locking mutex)
Negative USD values are rejected with an error and non-zero exit
load() only returns defaults for ENOENT; other errors (EACCES, corrupt JSON) are propagated
budget guard/record/reset commands still work correctly in single-process use

batches.title: Make eval runner agent ID configurable instead of hardcoded
acceptance_criteria: Agent ID is accepted as an optional CLI argument with default pi-coding-spike
Usage message reflects the new argument
Existing eval invocations without the argument still work

batches.title: Harden YAML task-list parsing in eval suite runner
acceptance_criteria: Comment lines in the YAML file are not picked up as task names
Task names with spaces are handled correctly (no word-splitting on the for loop)
Existing suite YAML files still parse correctly

batches.title: Remove eval from jig assertion helper in master-plan-unique.sh
acceptance_criteria: _assert no longer uses eval — the test expression is executed directly
All existing assertions still pass
